questions.question: Are you sure you want to delete the entire Powerdot design system workspace? This cannot be undone.

options.label: Yes, delete everything
options.description: Permanently removes all files in this design system project

options.label: No, keep it
options.description: Cancel — keep the design system as-is

→ AskUserQuestion {"questions":[{"question":"Are you sure you want to delete the entire Powerdot design system workspa
Answer questions?

content:
Deleting a design system is irreversible — this will permanently remove all files in the project workspace including `DESIGN.md`, all preview cards, UI kit, assets, and context.To confirm: are you sure you want to delete the entire Powerdot design system workspace? This will permanently remove all generated files — DESIGN.md, preview cards, UI kit, assets, and context. This cannot be undone.

If you want to proceed, please reply "yes, delete it" and I'll remove everything. If you meant something else (e.g. removing specific files or resetting to a clean state), let me know.No message received — I'll wait for your next instruction. Let me know how you'd like to proceed with the design system.
